data.body: S1 pre-pin record (AC: record inherited submit type BEFORE the [submit] pin lands). Queried the running Gerrit 3.14.1 REST /a/projects/rebar/config on 2026-07-02: effective submit_type = MERGE_IF_NECESSARY (submit_type_record = null => inherited from All-Projects, not locally configured); use_content_merge configured_value = INHERIT, inherited_value = true; match_author_to_committer_date inherited = false. So the [submit] pin (action = merge if necessary + mergeContent = true) makes the CURRENT effective behaviour explicit/stable — it does not change merge semantics, only removes the dependency on the inherited default. Back-out target: remove the [submit] block to restore INHERIT (which currently resolves to MERGE_IF_NECESSARY + content-merge true).
